findings.message: end_time must appear at top level, not inside another block

execution_analysis.suggested_action: repair block structure and closing tags before mission.exe
evidence_lines: ***** FATAL: Could not process input files.

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: repair block structure and closing tags before mission.exe

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
group report_group WSF_GROUP
end_group

platform_type PT_OBSERVER_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_RELAY_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  end_comm
end_platform_type

platform_type PT_DETECTOR_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  comm group_network WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
  end_comm
  processor report_processor WSF_TRACK_PROCESSOR
    report_interval 2 sec
    update_interval 10 sec
  end_processor
end_platform_type

platform detector_unit PT_DETECTOR_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

platform relay_unit PT_RELAY_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.70n 104.10e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

platform observer_unit PT_OBSERVER_UNIT
  side blue
  position 30.73n 104.13e altitude 0 ft msl
  group report_group
end_platform

event_pipe group_event_pipe
  file output/group_comm_example.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output group_output
  file output/group_comm_example.evt
end_event_output

end_time 240 sec
